title: Table to Farm
description: In partnership with involveMINT, we're building a community-based circular economy where residents earn "Impact Credits" through social and environmental activities — engaging Pittsburgh youth as climate changemakers.

title: Shred the Debt
description: Pittsburgh joins 25+ hubs in the U.S. Shred the Debt campaign with Undue Medical Debt — every dollar donated erases $100 of medical debt.
